texto: Long after the bomb falls and you and your good deeds are gone, cockroaches will still be here, prowling the streets like armored cars.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tama Janowitz: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Long after the bomb falls and you and your good deeds are gone, cockroaches will still be here, p…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, good, long pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de long e you.

texto: On bad days, I think I'd like to be a plastic surgeon who goes to Third World countries and operates on children in villages with airlifts, and then I think, 'Yeah, right, I'm going to go back to undergraduate school and take all the biology I missed and then go to medical school.' No. No.
